Primary Focus: Statewide voter registration, GOTV, coalition coordination (50+ partner orgs)
Issue / Constituency Tags: Multiracial democracy; BIPOC voter engagement; voting rights; voter registration; civic infrastructure
Evidence Summary: Ecosystem-backed, directional — not causally validated at org level. Documented outputs: 122K voters registered, Vote by Mail legislative victory (multi-actor), 2025 PA Supreme Court retention wins (coalition). MVP Neighborhood Captains RCT with David Nickerson underway — results pending.
One-Sentence Pitch: The statewide coordinating infrastructure for Pennsylvania's progressive civic ecosystem — a single grant simultaneously activates 50+ partner organizations across the most contested state of the 2026 cycle.
Key Risks & Flags: 1) Regrantor dilution: impact depends on partner quality; no visibility into how PA Voice enforces accountability across 50+ grantees. 2) Rapid revenue growth (3.8→8.6M) could indicate outpacing of internal capacity. 3) Revenue concentration unknown — Schedule B legally redacted.
